basic_details.job_title: ANIIMS Recruitment 2026 - Apply Offline for Infection Control Nurse, Data Manager Posts
basic_details.organization_name: Andaman and Nicobar Islands Institute of Medical Sciences (ANIIMS)
basic_details.notification_number: F. No. I-484/ANIIMS/National Programme on AMR Containment/Recruitment File/2026/561
basic_details.short_information: Andaman and Nicobar Islands Institute of Medical Sciences (ANIIMS) Infection Control Nurse, Data Manager Notification 2026 has been released on 02 June 2026 on the official website http://aniims.andamannicobar.gov.in. A total of 2 vacancies have been announced through the ANIIMS Recruitment 2026 for the posts of Infection Control Nurse and Data Manager.

age_limit.details: Maximum Age Limit: 40 years for all posts. Age relaxation will be as per government rules.

qualification.education_qualification: BSc. Nursing, Graduate/Diploma in Computer Applications
qualification.details: Infection Control Nurse: BSc. Nursing from a Recognized Institution/ University/ Board with Atleast 2 years' experience in nursing at a govt./private hospital. Desirable: Trained in Infection prevention and control. Data Manager: Graduate/Diploma in Computer Applications from Govt. recognized institution with Computer Proficiency including MS Office word/ excel/power point, email and internet and Experience of minimum 1 year in Data management preferably in public health sector. Desirable: Post Graduate with degree (Computer Applications).

salary_details.details: Infection Control Nurse: Rs. 25,000/- Per Month Data Manager: Rs. 20,000/- Per Month

how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for ANIIMS Various Posts Recruitment 2026 through offline mode should follow the steps below.
Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Download the application form from the official website: http://aniims.andamannicobar.gov.in.
Fill the application form carefully with correct information.
Attach self-attested copies of required documents such as photograph, signature, ID proof, and certificates.
Check all details carefully before submission.
Send the completed application form to the address mentioned in the notification through Speed Post / Registered Post or as instructed.
Ensure the application reaches before the last date: 24-06-2026.
Keep a photocopy of the submitted application form for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the ANIIMS recruitment?
faq.answer: The last date to submit the application for the ANIIMS recruitment is 24th June 2026. Ensure your application reaches the designated address by this date.

faq.question: Q2. What are the educational qualifications required for the Infection Control Nurse post?
faq.answer: For the Infection Control Nurse position, candidates must possess a BSc. Nursing from a recognized institution with at least 2 years of nursing experience. Training in infection prevention and control is desirable.

faq.question: Q3. What is the age limit for the posts advertised by ANIIMS?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for all the posts advertised by ANIIMS is 40 years. Age relaxation will be provided as per government norms.

faq.question: Q4. Is there any application fee for the ANIIMS recruitment?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for this recruitment drive by ANIIMS.

faq.question: Q5. How many vacancies are available in this ANIIMS recruitment?
faq.answer: A total of 2 vacancies are available in this recruitment drive. One vacancy is for the Infection Control Nurse post and another for the Data Manager post.

faq.question: Q6. What is the mode of application for the ANIIMS recruitment?
faq.answer: The mode of application for the ANIIMS recruitment is offline. Candidates need to send their filled application forms to the official address mentioned in the notification.

faq.question: Q7. What is the salary offered for the Infection Control Nurse and Data Manager posts?
faq.answer: The Infection Control Nurse will receive a salary of Rs. 25,000/- per month, while the Data Manager will receive Rs. 20,000/- per month.

faq.question: Q8. What is the selection process for the ANIIMS recruitment?
faq.answer: The selection process for the ANIIMS recruitment will involve a scrutiny of applications followed by an interview of the shortlisted candidates.

faq.question: Q9. Where can I find the official notification and application form?
faq.answer: The official notification and application form can be downloaded from the official website of ANIIMS, the link for which is provided in the Important Links section.

faq.question: Q10. What is the official website of ANIIMS?
faq.answer: The official website of the Andaman and Nicobar Islands Institute of Medical Sciences (ANIIMS) is http://aniims.andamannicobar.gov.in.
